# navikt/fp-context

> Navigational hub and cross-cutting policy authority for Foreldrepenger AI context across all downstream repositories.

This hub serves as the primary grounding point for AI assistants, IDE agents, and GitHub Copilot spaces operating within Team Foreldrepenger (@navikt/teamforeldrepenger). It translates Norwegian legal frameworks (Folketrygdloven Kap. 14) into software architectural concepts and dictates standards for the application stack.

## Core Context & Domain

- [Domain and Business Context](domain/business-context.md): Core business logic based on Folketrygdloven kap. 14, system value chain, and key business concepts.
- [Domain Glossary](domain/glossary.md): Bidirectional mapping of Norwegian domain terms to codebase concepts to prevent model hallucination.

## Architecture & Technology Stack

- [System Overview](architecture/system-overview.md): Repository tier classification, data flow diagrams, and NAIS runtime deployment mapping.
- [Backend Stack](architecture/backend-stack.md): Specifications for Java ecosystem architecture including Jetty, Jersey, Weld, Hibernate, and Jackson.
- [Frontend Stack](architecture/frontend-stack.md): Framework rules for React, Aksel design system, React Hook Form, and TanStack.

## Code Conventions & Workflows

- [Java Codestyle](conventions/java-codestyle.md): Functional and fluent paradigms for Java 25+ compilation targets.
- [Engineering Workflow](conventions/workflow.md): Trunk-based development protocols, Pull Request standards, and CI/CD validation gates.
- [Testing Mechanisms](conventions/testing.md): Execution layout splitting unit tests (per repo) from integration setups (fp-autotest).

## Operations & Infrastructure

- [CI/CD Pipelines](operations/ci-cd.md): Configuration architecture for fp-gha-workflows, SonarCloud analytics, and NAIS platform targets.
- [Dependency Management](operations/dependency-management.md): Governance rules regarding fp-bom usage and automated Dependabot lifecycles.

## Optional

- [Contribution Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md): Explicit instructions for modifying context files, enforcing an AI-first, data-dense, table-centric layout.
- [Companion Hub: GitHub Actions](https://github.com): Reusable workflows and composite actions catalog referenced by this hub.
- [Companion Hub: Java BOM](https://github.com): Strict version pins, Jakarta EE 11 platform declarations, and parent POM definitions.
- [Shared Code: Common Blocks](https://github.com): Core shared Java components utilized across backend microservices.
